title: Template: Sum to 42
lesson:
This is the example challenge for the copyable level template. The toy 'Template VM' has one register (A) and five instructions: SET, ADD, SUB, OUT, HLT.

Copy this challenge file's structure to author real challenges: a `lesson`, a `prompt`, `starterCode`, progressive `hints`, a declarative `success` check, and a `reference` solution used by the automated verifier.
prompt: Make register A equal 42 and print it, then halt.
hints: SET puts a value in A; ADD adds to it.
SET 40 then ADD 2 gives 42. OUT prints it; HLT stops.
successText: A must equal 42 and the program must print it.
